phases.title: Truth authority collapse
tasks: point runtime state, manifest, and active PRD to one authoritative program
demote stale primary plans
align current blockers and next actions with actual route and runner truth
exit_gates: runtime state is aligned with the current program
press-go manifest references the current authoritative plan
stale primary plans are no longer treated as authoritative

phases.title: Contract propagation and lane convergence
tasks: propagate current contract commits into active lane worktrees
verify geometry-law command surface in active worktrees
verify route-gate aware contract availability in active worktrees
exit_gates: active lane worktrees carry the current contract
worktree contract verification passes

phases.title: Geometry-law execution as first-class QA
tasks: promote geometry-law audit into systems-qa acceptance
require geometry-law evidence for route-family integration promotion
update squads, cycle templates, and salvage rules
exit_gates: geometry-law reports are required route-family artifacts
systems-qa and integration recipes explicitly require geometry-law evidence

phases.title: XR closure under shared kernel law
tasks: refresh XR truth and evidence
repair shared route-family law surfaces only
close the blocking XR gap
exit_gates: /work/xr closes with zero critical and zero major route-family diffs
no blocking XR gap remains
no XR-only fork exists

phases.title: FT replication proof
tasks: prove family-law replication on /work/ft
emit explicit FT gap state if replication fails
reject any XR-only kernel patch
exit_gates: /work/ft closes or emits an explicit deterministic gap
XR and FT remain explainable under one family law

phases.title: Integration currency and checkpoint freshness
tasks: replay accepted XR and FT candidates through integration
create a fresh current integration checkpoint
update evidence pointers to current accepted commits
exit_gates: integration evidence is current
current checkpoint matches current accepted route-family state

phases.title: Matrix and augmentation law expansion
tasks: expand the viewport matrix
promote augmentation backlog into measurable law items
preserve route integrity across the expanded matrix
exit_gates: responsive matrix is current
augmentation program is seeded and measurable

phases.title: Supervised recursive proof
tasks: run one supervised current-contract recursive cycle
require clean queue settlement and current evidence
reject any cycle that requires manual queue edits
exit_gates: supervised cycle passes
no stale lock or runner mismatch survives

phases.title: Recovery and interruption proof
tasks: exercise stale-job recovery on the current runner
exercise replay conflict rejection and interruption recovery
capture fresh recovery evidence
exit_gates: recovery evidence is current
no recovery drift remains

phases.title: Guarded unattended eligibility
tasks: run a bounded guarded local autonomy window
verify improvement-or-hold behavior only
keep press_go false until explicit human authorization
exit_gates: guarded local autonomy passes
system is truthfully eligible for bounded unattended operation

stop_conditions: stale lock that cannot be recovered cleanly
press_go_rule: press_go remains false until H0-H9 are satisfied and explicit human authorization is recorded
